name: wxcode-admin-pulse-crm
title: Pulse Admin
description: Airy light-mode admin aesthetic: white/slate canvas (#f8fafc), sky-blue accent (#0ea5e9 / #2563eb), subtle 1px borders, 10px-radius white cards with a faint drop shadow, Inter type with tabular figures. Archetype = workspace-switcher sidebar (240px) + topbar with search and filter chips + 4 KPI tiles with inline SVG sparklines and delta chips + a stage-progress strip (N columns, proportional fill bars) + a 2-column split (records table + activity/tasks side panel), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this airy light-mode admin aesthetic to my domain — sky-blue accent, workspace-switcher sidebar, topbar with search and filter chips, 4 KPI tiles with sparklines, a stage-progress strip, a records table with status pills, and an activity/tasks side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个清爽亮色管理界面风格应用到我的领域：天蓝强调色、工作区切换侧栏、带搜索和筛选的顶栏、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、阶段进度条、带状态标签的记录表格，以及活动 / 任务侧栏，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
